name: Successor Liability Transfer Election

eligibility.description: Requires a person to become a successor of a last signatory operator and formal notification to the trustees of the 1992 UMWA Benefit Plan.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A last signatory operator may transfer its liability for eligible beneficiaries to a successor in interest, potentially offloading long-term health benefit obligations during a business sale or reorganization.
